switching_cost_analysis: Switching costs are moderate-to-high for deeply integrated protocols (e.g., Uniswap v4 hooks, Circle CCTP routing via Wormhole) due to custom SDK/API rewrites and re-auditing requirements, but greenfield dApps face low friction given competing SDKs (LayerZero, Axelar) offer comparable developer tooling.
rationale: Wormhole holds a strong #2 TVL position in the bridge category on DefiLlama (~$870M as of July 2025), trailing only Stargate/LayerZero, and benefits from deep institutional integrations including Circle (CCTP), Uniswap, and 30+ L1/L2 chains. Its Guardian network of 19 validators (including Jump, Everstake, Figment) provides a differentiated security model versus optimistic bridges, but the 2022 $320M exploit remains a reputational overhang. Developer ecosystem data from Electric Capital's free report does not break out Wormhole-specific contributors, so dev metrics are estimated from GitHub public repo activity (~200+ integration repos across wormhole-foundation org).
sources: https://wormhole.com/ecosystem (integration count ~200+ cited on project page)
https://developerreport.com/ (Electric Capital 2024 — Wormhole not broken out at free tier)

NOTE: DAU, 30d revenue, precise message-volume market share NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — Token Terminal requires paid plan for bridge revenue breakdowns; Wormhole native analytics dashboard (wormholescan.io) shows tx counts but not USD revenue
